component.name: MainScene

Label.text: Use this code on your setup website

component.script:
sub init() m.video = m.top.findNode("videoPlayer") m.categoryList = m.top.findNode("categoryList") m.channelList = m.top.findNode("channelList") m.infoTitle = m.top.findNode("infoTitle") m.infoMeta = m.top.findNode("infoMeta")
m.setupOverlay = m.top.findNode("setupOverlay") m.setupStatus = m.top.findNode("setupStatus") m.deviceCode = m.top.findNode("deviceCodeValue").text m.apiBase = "http://192.168.1.81:3001" m.activationTask = invalid m.loadChannelsTask = invalid m.isRefreshing = false m.isLoadingChannels = false
if m.progressTimer <> invalid then m.progressTimer.control = "stop" end if m.loadedChannels = invalid m.lastActivation = invalid m.bgRefreshTask = invalid buildCategories() m.categoryList.observeField("itemFocused", "onCategoryFocus") m.channelList.observeField("itemFocused", "onChannelFocus")
m.top.findNode("activateButton").observeField("buttonSelected", "onActivatePressed") m.top.findNode("refreshButton").observeField("buttonSelected", "onRefreshPressed") m.top.findNode("closeSetupButton").observeField("buttonSelected", "onCloseSetup")
m.top.findNode("activateButton").setFocus(true)
' AUTO START ACTIVATION CHECK m.setupOverlay.visible = false
ensureActivationTask() m.isRefreshing = true m.setupStatus.text = "Checking activation..." m.activationTask.apiBase = m.apiBase m.activationTask.deviceCode = m.deviceCode m.activationTask.control = "RUN" end sub sub onCloseSetup() m.isRefreshing = false m.isLoadingChannels = false m.setupOverlay.visible = false m.setupStatus.text = "" m.categoryList.setFocus(true) end sub
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if not press then return false if m.setupOverlay = invalid or m.setupOverlay.visible = false then return false
activateBtn = m.top.findNode("activateButton") refreshBtn = m.top.findNode("refreshButton") closeBtn = m.top.findNode("closeSetupButton")
if key = "OK" or key = "select" then if activateBtn.hasFocus() then onActivatePressed() return true end if if refreshBtn.hasFocus() then onRefreshPressed() return true end if if closeBtn.hasFocus() then onCloseSetup() return true end if end if
if key = "back" then onCloseSetup() return true end if
if key = "right" then if activateBtn.hasFocus() then refreshBtn.setFocus(true) return true end if if refreshBtn.hasFocus() then closeBtn.setFocus(true) return true end if end if
if key = "left" then if closeBtn.hasFocus() then refreshBtn.setFocus(true) return true end if if refreshBtn.hasFocus() then activateBtn.setFocus(true) return true end if end if
return false end function sub onActivatePressed() m.setupStatus.text = "Go to your website and enter code " + m.top.findNode("deviceCodeValue").text end sub sub onRefreshPressed() print "DEBUG: onRefreshPressed" if m.isRefreshing then m.setupStatus.text = "Still checking activation..." return end if
ensureActivationTask()
m.isRefreshing = true m.setupStatus.text = "Checking activation..."
if m.progressTimer <> invalid then m.progressTimer.control = "stop" end if
m.activationTask.apiBase = m.apiBase m.activationTask.deviceCode = m.deviceCode m.activationTask.control = "RUN" end sub
sub hideSetupFields() end sub
function setupFieldsVisible() as Boolean return false end function
sub ensureActivationTask() if m.activationTask <> invalid then return
m.activationTask = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ActivationCheckTask") m.activationTask.observeField("responseJson", "onActivationTaskResponse") m.activationTask.observeField("errorMessage", "onActivationTaskError") end sub sub onActivationTaskResponse() print "DEBUG: onActivationTaskResponse" if m.activationTask = invalid then return
response = m.activationTask.responseJson print "DEBUG: activation response len = "; Len(response) if response = invalid or response = "" then return
m.isRefreshing = false
data = ParseJson(response) if data = invalid or data.ok <> true or data.activation = invalid then m.setupStatus.text = "Not activated yet." return end if
m.setupStatus.text = "Activated!" m.lastActivation = data.activation m.isLoadingChannels = true startLoadingChannels(data.activation) end sub
sub onActivationTaskError() if m.activationTask = invalid then return
err = m.activationTask.errorMessage if err = invalid or err = "" then return
m.isRefreshing = false m.setupStatus.text = err end sub
sub ensureLoadChannelsTask() if m.loadChannelsTask <> invalid then return
m.loadChannelsTask = CreateObject("roSGNode", "LoadChannelsTask") m.loadChannelsTask.observeField("responseJson", "onLoadChannelsTaskResponse") m.loadChannelsTask.observeField("errorMessage", "onLoadChannelsTaskError") end sub
sub onProgressTick() if m.progressTimer = invalid then return
m.progressStep = m.progressStep + 1
if m.progressStep = 1 then m.setupStatus.text = "Connecting to provider..." else if m.progressStep = 2 then m.setupStatus.text = "Downloading playlist..." else if m.progressStep = 3 then m.setupStatus.text = "Parsing channels..." else if m.progressStep = 4 then m.setupStatus.text = "Almost done..." else if m.progressStep > 5 then m.progressStep = 2 end if end sub
sub startLoadingChannels(activation as Object) print "DEBUG: startLoadingChannels" ensureLoadChannelsTask()
m.setupStatus.text = "Loading cached channels..."
m.progressTimer = CreateObject("roSGNode", "Timer") m.progressTimer.duration = 2 m.progressTimer.repeat = true m.progressTimer.observeField("fire", "onProgressTick") m.progressStep = 0 m.progressTimer.control = "start"
m.loadChannelsTask.apiBase = m.apiBase m.loadChannelsTask.setupType = aaLookupString(activation, "setupType") m.loadChannelsTask.host = aaLookupString(activation, "serverUrl") m.loadChannelsTask.username = aaLookupString(activation, "username") m.loadChannelsTask.password = aaLookupString(activation, "password") m.loadChannelsTask.m3uUrl = aaLookupString(activation, "playlistUrl") m.loadChannelsTask.epgUrl = aaLookupString(activation, "epgUrl") m.loadChannelsTask.forceRefresh = false m.loadChannelsTask.control = "RUN" end sub
sub onLoadChannelsTaskResponse() print "DEBUG: onLoadChannelsTaskResponse" if m.loadChannelsTask = invalid then return if m.isLoadingChannels = false then return
raw = m.loadChannelsTask.responseJson print "DEBUG: channels response len = "; Len(raw) if raw = invalid or raw = "" then return
data = ParseJson(raw) if data = invalid or data.ok <> true or data.channels = invalid or data.channels.Count() = 0 then m.isLoadingChannels = false m.setupStatus.text = "No channels returned." return end if
' Load the first 25 real channels for Roku UI subset = [] maxCount = 5000 for i = 0 to data.channels.Count() - 1 if i >= maxCount then exit for subset.Push(data.channels[i]) end for
print "DEBUG: before populateLoadedChannels" m.loadedChannels = subset populateLoadedChannels() print "DEBUG: after populateLoadedChannels" clearDemoGuideForLoadedChannels()
m.isLoadingChannels = false m.setupStatus.text = "Loaded first 25 channels." m.setupOverlay.visible = false m.setupStatus.text = "" m.infoMeta.text = "Loaded provider channels" m.channelList.jumpToItem = 0 m.channelList.setFocus(true) print "DEBUG: finished onLoadChannelsTaskResponse"
if m.lastActivation <> invalid then startBackgroundRefresh(m.lastActivation) end if end sub
sub startBackgroundRefresh(activation as Object) if activation = invalid then return if m.bgRefreshTask <> invalid then return
print "DEBUG: startBackgroundRefresh" m.bgRefreshTask = CreateObject("roSGNode", "LoadChannelsTask") m.bgRefreshTask.observeField("responseJson", "onBackgroundRefreshResponse") m.bgRefreshTask.observeField("errorMessage", "onBackgroundRefreshError")
m.bgRefreshTask.apiBase = m.apiBase m.bgRefreshTask.setupType = aaLookupString(activation, "setupType") m.bgRefreshTask.host = aaLookupString(activation, "serverUrl") m.bgRefreshTask.username = aaLookupString(activation, "username") m.bgRefreshTask.password = aaLookupString(activation, "password") m.bgRefreshTask.m3uUrl = aaLookupString(activation, "playlistUrl") m.bgRefreshTask.epgUrl = aaLookupString(activation, "epgUrl") m.bgRefreshTask.forceRefresh = true m.bgRefreshTask.control = "RUN" end sub
sub onBackgroundRefreshResponse() if m.bgRefreshTask = invalid then return
raw = m.bgRefreshTask.responseJson if raw = invalid or raw = "" then return
print "DEBUG: onBackgroundRefreshResponse len = "; Len(raw)
data = ParseJson(raw) if data = invalid or data.ok <> true or data.channels = invalid or data.channels.Count() = 0 then m.bgRefreshTask = invalid return end if
subset = [] maxCount = 5000 for i = 0 to data.channels.Count() - 1 if i >= maxCount then exit for subset.Push(data.channels[i]) end for
m.loadedChannels = subset populateLoadedChannels() clearDemoGuideForLoadedChannels() m.infoMeta.text = "Channels refreshed in background" m.bgRefreshTask = invalid end sub
sub onBackgroundRefreshError() if m.bgRefreshTask = invalid then return
err = m.bgRefreshTask.errorMessage print "DEBUG: background refresh error = "; err m.bgRefreshTask = invalid end sub
sub onLoadChannelsTaskError() print "DEBUG: onLoadChannelsTaskError" if m.loadChannelsTask = invalid then return if m.isLoadingChannels = false then return
err = m.loadChannelsTask.errorMessage print "DEBUG: channels error = "; err if err = invalid or err = "" then return
m.isLoadingChannels = false m.setupStatus.text = err end sub
sub populateLoadedChannels() if m.loadedChannels = invalid then return
content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode")
for each ch in m.loadedChannels item = content.CreateChild("ContentNode")
num = aaLookupString(ch, "number") nm = aaLookupString(ch, "name") url = aaLookupString(ch, "streamUrl")
if num <> "" then item.title = num + " " + nm else item.title = nm end if
item.addField("url", "string", true) item.url = url end for
m.channelList.content = content
firstChannel = m.channelList.content.getChild(0) if firstChannel <> invalid then print "DEBUG: first loaded channel ready" playChannel(firstChannel) end if end sub
sub clearDemoGuideForLoadedChannels() ' Remove fake guide names completely m.top.findNode("rowLabel1").text = "" m.top.findNode("rowLabel2").text = "" m.top.findNode("rowLabel3").text = "" m.top.findNode("rowLabel4").text = ""
' Remove fake guide titles completely m.top.findNode("p11t").text = "" m.top.findNode("p12t").text = "" m.top.findNode("p21t").text = "" m.top.findNode("p22t").text = "" m.top.findNode("p31t").text = "" m.top.findNode("p32t").text = "" m.top.findNode("p41t").text = "" m.top.findNode("p42t").text = ""
' Fade out fake guide blocks m.top.findNode("p11").color = "0x162a4f44" m.top.findNode("p12").color = "0x162a4f44" m.top.findNode("p21").color = "0x162a4f44" m.top.findNode("p22").color = "0x162a4f44" m.top.findNode("p31").color = "0x162a4f44" m.top.findNode("p32").color = "0x162a4f44" m.top.findNode("p41").color = "0x162a4f44" m.top.findNode("p42").color = "0x162a4f44" end sub
function aaLookupString(obj as Dynamic, key as String) as String if obj = invalid then return "" val = obj.Lookup(key) if val = invalid then return "" return val end function
sub buildCategories() content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode")
addListItem(content, "Movies") addListItem(content, "Sports") addListItem(content, "News") addListItem(content, "Family")
m.categoryList.content = content end sub
sub addListItem(parent as Object, title as String) item = parent.CreateChild("ContentNode") item.title = title end sub
sub onCategoryFocus() if m.loadedChannels <> invalid and m.loadedChannels.Count() > 0 then print "DEBUG: category focus ignored because loaded channels are active" return end if
item = m.categoryList.content.getChild(m.categoryList.itemFocused) if item <> invalid updateChannelsAndGuide(item.title) end if end sub
sub onChannelFocus() item = m.channelList.content.getChild(m.channelList.itemFocused) if item <> invalid then m.infoTitle.text = item.title m.infoMeta.text = "Loaded provider channel" print "DEBUG: channel focus -> "; item.title playChannel(item) end if end sub
sub updateChannelsAndGuide(category as String) print "DEBUG: updateChannelsAndGuide disabled for loaded-provider mode" end sub
sub buildChannels(category as String) print "DEBUG: buildChannels disabled" end sub
sub addChannel(parent as Object, title as String) print "DEBUG: addChannel disabled" end sub
sub buildGuide(category as String) print "DEBUG: buildGuide disabled" end sub
sub setRowLabels(a as String, b as String, c as String, d as String) end sub
sub setProgramTexts(a as String, b as String, c as String, d as String, e as String, f as String, g as String, h as String) end sub
sub playChannel(channel as Object) print "DEBUG: playChannel -> "; channel.title
if channel = invalid then return if channel.url = invalid or channel.url = "" then m.infoTitle.text = channel.title m.infoMeta.text = "No stream URL available" return end if
content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") content.url = channel.url content.streamformat = "hls" m.video.content = content m.video.control = "play"
m.infoTitle.text = channel.title m.infoMeta.text = "Playing live stream" end sub
